rationale: Both evaluations independently reach the same conclusion: the candidate lacks the required JVM/Kotlin/Spring stack, scoring near-identically (3 vs 4). The one-point difference and reworded reasoning fall within ordinary run-to-run noise, and neither evaluation references the changed employer names (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective vs Google/Meta/Amazon) as a basis for any score, strength, or concern. The reasoning keys entirely off the same job-relevant skill gaps in both versions.
